LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT S.F.P.D. CHIEF OF POLICE GEORGE GASCON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 430.10(E). THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT PLEAD FACTS ESTABLISHING PLAINTIFF COMPLIED WITH THE MANDATORY GOVERNMENT CLAIMS ACT PRE-LAWSUIT PRESENTATION REQUIREMENTS. (GOV. CODE SEC. 945.4.) THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT STATED HE COULD AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CURE THIS DEFECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976 *AFTER TENTATIVE RULING CONFIRMED AND ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT, THE PLAINTIFF, WAYNE SMITH, APPEARS VIA COURTCALL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT ON COURTCALL WHEN THE CASE WAS CALLED.*

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Smith, plaintiff in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court issues ruling on PLAINTIFF WAYNE SMITH's MOTION FOR RE-HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT: Denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

ATTY. BRADLEY A. RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3964 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF WAYNE SMITH'S Notice For Rehearing To Notice Of Demurrer To Complaint And Demurrer Of Defendant IS CONTINUED TO MAY 16, 2014 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bradley Russi, Deputy City Attorney, 415.554.3964, for Defendant SFPD Chief of Police George Gascon; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT S.F.P.D. CHIEF OF POLICE GEORGE GASCON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend pursuant to CCP sec. 430.10(e). The complaint does not plead facts establishing Plaintiff complied with the mandatory Government Claims Act pre-lawsuit presentation requirements. (Gov. Code sec. 945.4.) The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend because Plaintiff has not stated he could amend the complaint to cure this defect. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

*After tentative ruling confirmed and order signed by the Court, the Plaintiff, Wayne Smith, appears via CourtCall. The Plaintiff was not on CourtCall when the case was called.*
